what_it_does: Implements a minimal module registry and initializer under global.DNA.gallery: gallery scripts register themselves by id in load order, and a later call to init(ctx) initializes each registered module with the supplied context.
observations: Uses an IIFE on window to create or extend global.DNA
Keeps an order array and a mods object keyed by module id
init walks the insertion order and calls each module's init(ctx)
A failing module is logged but does not stop subsequent modules
Modules are expected to be plain scripts that call DNA.gallery.register(id, { init })
The context object is assembled by index.html and exposes live state/getters
Comments explicitly frame this as the same shape as DNA.rooms
standouts: Duplicate ids are dropped silently rather than overwritten
conventions: Object-literal API with register and init methods
Defensive try/catch around each module init call
concerns: Duplicate registrations are silently ignored, which can hide id collisions
No mechanism to unregister, re-init, or inspect registered modules
Initialization failures are only console.error with no upstream signal
this.ctx is assigned on the gallery object instead of kept in closure state
notes: A tiny gallery plugin seam: scripts register in load order, then all get initialized with a shared context, with failures isolated per module.
questions: What exact getters and live state does index.html put on ctx?
How is the claimed 'same shape as DNA.rooms' symmetry maintained or verified?
Should duplicate registration warn, overwrite, or remain silent?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose matches what it does: it is a register-then-initialize module seam that delegates all state and helpers to the injected context.
intention_signals: The file is trying to provide a zero-friction plugin surface where gallery modules can be added as plain scripts and initialized against a shared runtime context, so that modules do not need to manage their own state or bootstrap logic.
contribution: Provides a lightweight, failure-isolated module initialization seam that lets gallery scripts register themselves and receive a shared context, keeping module code decoupled from runtime assembly.
summary_for_embedding: core.js defines DNA.gallery, a minimal ordered module registry that initializes registered gallery scripts with a shared context supplied by index.html.
intention_for_embedding: To create a plain-script plugin seam for gallery modules that mirrors DNA.rooms and keeps modules dependent on an injected context rather than internal state.
